paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And when Abram was ninety years old and nine, Jehovah appeared to Abram, and said unto him, I am God Almighty; walk before me, and be thou perfect.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And I will make my covenant between me and thee, and will multiply thee exceedingly.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Abram fell on his face: and God talked with him, saying,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: As for me, behold, my covenant is with thee, and thou shalt be the father of a multitude of nations.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Neither shall thy name any more be called Abram, but thy name shall be Abraham; for the father of a multitude of nations have I made thee.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And I will make thee exceeding fruitful, and I will make nations of thee, and kings shall come out of thee.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And I will establish my covenant between me and thee and thy seed after thee throughout their generations for an everlasting covenant, to be a God unto thee and to thy seed after thee.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And I will give unto thee, and to thy seed after thee, the land of thy sojournings, all the land of Canaan, for an everlasting possession; and I will be their God.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And God said unto Abraham, And as for thee, thou shalt keep my covenant, thou, and thy seed after thee throughout their generations.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: This is my covenant, which ye shall keep, between me and you and thy seed after thee: every male among you shall be circumcised.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And ye shall be circumcised in the flesh of your foreskin; and it shall be a token of a covenant betwixt me and you.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he that is eight days old shall be circumcised among you, every male throughout your generations, he that is born in the house, or bought with money of any foreigner that is not of thy seed.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: He that is born in thy house, and he that is bought with thy money, must needs be circumcised: and my covenant shall be in your flesh for an everlasting covenant.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the uncircumcised male who is not circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin, that soul shall be cut off from his people; he hath broken my covenant.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And I will bless her, and moreover I will give thee a son of her: yea, I will bless her, and she shall be [a mother of] nations; kings of peoples shall be of her.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Then Abraham fell upon his face, and laughed, and said in his heart, Shall a child be born unto him that is a hundred years old? and shall Sarah, that is ninety years old, bear?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Abraham said unto God, Oh that Ishmael might live before thee!

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And God said, Nay, but Sarah thy wife shall bear thee a son; and thou shalt call his name Isaac: and I will establish my covenant with him for an everlasting covenant for his seed after him.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And as for Ishmael, I have heard thee: behold, I have blessed him, and will make him fruitful, and will multiply him exceedingly; twelve princes shall he beget, and I will make him a great nation.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But my covenant will I establish with Isaac, whom Sarah shall bear unto thee at this set time in the next year.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he left off talking with him, and God went up from Abraham.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Abraham took Ishmael his son, and all that were born in his house, and all that were bought with his money, every male among the men of Abraham`s house, and circumcised the flesh of their foreskin in the selfsame day, as God had said unto him.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Abraham was ninety years old and nine, when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Ishmael his son was thirteen years old, when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: In the selfsame day was Abraham circumcised, and Ishmael his son.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the men of his house, those born in the house, and those bought with money of a foreigner, were circumcised with him.
